settings.text: Four kinds of clean, three recurring plans, a short list of honest add-ons, and a 24-hour guarantee on everything. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no surprise charges on the day.

settings.title: Save by booking on a cadence.
settings.description: All recurring plans include the same standard clean checklist. The cheaper the frequency, the cheaper each visit. No contracts — cancel any time.

settings.title: Weekly
settings.features:
+ Standard clean, every 7 days
+ Same cleaner, same day & time
+ Supplies always included
+ 10% off the standard rate
+ Priority rescheduling

settings.title: Biweekly
settings.features:
+ Standard clean, every 14 days
+ Same cleaner, same day & time
+ Supplies always included
+ 7% off the standard rate
+ Most popular choice — 60% of clients

settings.title: Monthly
settings.features:
+ Standard clean, every 28 days
+ Same cleaner, same day & time
+ Supplies always included
+ Full flat rate
+ Includes a 15-min deeper-focus area per visit

settings.title: A-la-carte extras.
settings.description: Add any of these to any clean. Priced per visit. We'll quote them up front — no surprises on the day.

settings.name: Inside the fridge
settings.description: Empty, wipe every shelf and drawer, sanitise, put everything back. Add 30 minutes.

settings.name: Inside the oven
settings.description: Racks out, degreaser in, every surface scrubbed. Eco-friendly oven cleaner — no fumes. Add 45 minutes.

settings.name: Interior windows
settings.description: Inside glass on every window and slider in the home. Streak-free, natural-daylight finish. Add 30–60 minutes.

settings.name: Laundry (one load, wash + fold)
settings.description: Wash, dry, fold, stack on the bed. Detergent included. Add 60–90 minutes (runs alongside cleaning, doesn't extend clean time).

settings.name: Bed linens change
settings.description: Strip beds, remake with fresh linens you've left out. Up to 3 beds included.

settings.name: Baseboards detail
settings.description: Full hand-scrub of all baseboards. Recommended every 3–4 months. Add 30–45 minutes.

settings.name: Inside kitchen cabinets
settings.description: Empty cabinet interiors, wipe, replace contents. Add 45–60 minutes.

settings.name: Pet-hair deep treatment
settings.description: Specialised tools for upholstery and textiles in pet-heavy homes. Add 30 minutes; recommended quarterly.

settings.title: Every clean, no upsell.
settings.description: The commitments that apply to every Sparkhaus clean at any price point.

settings.title: Background-checked
settings.description: Every cleaner on staff, every year.

settings.title: Same cleaner every visit
settings.description: Your cleaner learns your home over time.

settings.title: 24-hour guarantee
settings.description: Unhappy? We come back and re-clean free.

settings.title: No contracts
settings.description: Pause, change cadence, or cancel any time.

settings.title: Cancel up to 24h
settings.description: No fee, no questions, no guilt.

settings.title: Keyless entry option
settings.description: Smart-lock codes, lockboxes, or doorperson drop-off.

settings.title: Supplies provided
settings.description: We bring everything. Your home stays uncluttered.

settings.title: Not quite what you're looking for?
settings.text: We offer commercial cleaning (small offices, retail, post-event) as a separate service. Mention it in your inquiry and we'll quote separately.

settings.question: How long does a clean take?
settings.answer: A standard clean on a 2-bedroom home takes 2–3 hours with one cleaner. Deep cleans take 4–6. Move-in/out and post-construction depend on square footage — we'll quote the time with the price.

settings.question: Do I need to be home?
settings.answer: No — and most clients aren't. We offer keyless entry via smart-lock codes, lockboxes, or leaving a key with the doorperson. Whatever works for your building.

settings.question: Do you bring supplies?
settings.answer: Yes. Every clean includes all products, cloths, vacuums, and mops. We use Green Seal-certified eco-friendly products by default; if you want us to use your own products instead (fragrance allergies, for example), just tell us.

settings.question: What if something gets damaged?
settings.answer: We carry $2 million in liability insurance and we're bonded. If we break something, we replace it. In eight years of operation it has happened four times — we've made it right every time.

settings.question: How do you match a cleaner to my home?
settings.answer: Based on neighborhood, cleaning style (some cleaners are deep-clean specialists, others are recurring-standard), schedule, and pets / allergies. You can request to change cleaners at any time, no explanation needed.

settings.question: What if I'm not happy with a clean?
settings.answer: Tell us within 24 hours and we send the same cleaner (or a different one, if you'd prefer) back to re-clean the specific areas you weren't happy with. Free. That's the guarantee.

settings.text: Flat-rate quote in under two minutes. First clean this week if you want it.
